strict.note: Visual props must resolve to --cascivo-* tokens; never hard-code color, spacing, or size values
WCAG 2.1 AA contract is fixed; don't weaken roles, remove aria attributes, or break keyboard interaction
Signals only (useSignal, useComputed, useSignalEffect); no useState/useEffect/useContext/useReducer in cascade components
User-visible component chrome strings must use @cascivo/i18n; no hard-coded English fallbacks in component source
All visual values via --cascivo-* tokens; no Tailwind, no inline styles, no CSS-in-JS

flexible.note: Choose any step on the --cascivo-space-* scale to fit the layout; no single correct answer
User-facing copy (via labels prop) is free within content-tone guidance
Compose cascade components freely; blocks and sections are starting points, not locked layouts
data-theme can be applied to any container, not just :root; themes can be scoped
Which variant to use (primary/secondary/ghost) is a design decision — choose what fits the hierarchy

Accordion.note: type prop is free to choose based on whether sections are exclusive
Borders, surfaces, and radii must resolve to --cascivo-* semantic tokens

ActionSheet.note: Any number of actions; each may be destructive or disabled
showCancel toggles the separate Cancel button (Escape/outside press still dismiss)

Alert.note: Choose the severity variant that matches the message; default is neutral

AlertDialog.note: No light-dismiss — closing must go through onConfirm/onCancel
confirm/cancel copy overridable via labels; defaults come from the i18n catalog
Visual styling resolves to semantic --cascivo-color-* tokens; destructive variant uses --cascivo-color-destructive

AspectRatio.note: Any positive number; common values are 16/9, 4/3, 1, 3/2
The single child is stretched to fill; provide one media element

Avatar.note: Pick the size that fits the surrounding density
Fallback and status colors must resolve to --cascivo-* semantic tokens

AvatarGroup.note: Pick the overlap that fits the surrounding density
The +N label must come from i18n (builtin.avatarGroup.more or a labels override)

Badge.note: Choose the variant that matches the semantic meaning
Colors and radius must resolve to --cascivo-* tokens (--cascivo-radius-badge)

Blockquote.note: cite is optional; omit when the source is given in surrounding context
Border and text colors must resolve to --cascivo-* tokens

BottomSheet.note: Any ascending list of viewport fractions; the sheet snaps between them

Breadcrumb.note: Collapse long trails to fit available width
Text colors and focus ring must resolve to --cascivo-* tokens

Button.note: Visual props must resolve to --cascivo-button-* / semantic tokens

ButtonGroup.note: Outer corner radius must resolve to --cascivo-button-radius / --cascivo-radius-control to match standalone buttons
Any focusable controls (Button, IconButton, links) may be grouped

Calendar.note: All date props are native Date objects compared in UTC
Weekday labels, month label, and first-day-of-week derive from the locale via Intl (with Monday fallback)
month/year/onViewChange/hideNav let a parent drive navigation (used by DateRangePicker)

Card.note: Choose elevation and density to fit the surrounding layout
Surface, border, radius, and shadow must resolve to --cascivo-* tokens

Carousel.note: Paging uses native CSS scroll-snap, not transform math — no custom easing config
Any ReactNode may be a slide; pass via children or the slides array

ChatBubble.note: Accepts any ReactNode — Avatar, initials, icon, or nothing
children accepts rich content including images, links, and formatted text

Checkbox.note: Spreads InputHTMLAttributes — name, value, required, checked, onChange all pass through
Control styling resolves to semantic --cascivo-color-* / --cascivo-radius-sm tokens

CheckboxCard.note: Supports both checked + onCheckedChange and defaultChecked

Code.note: sm fits dense UI; md matches body text
Font and surface must resolve to --cascivo-font-mono and --cascivo-* tokens

CodeSnippet.note: inline | single | multi — controls the wrapping element and layout
Shown by default for single/multi; togglable via showCopyButton

Collapsible.note: Controlled or uncontrolled via open / defaultOpen
Always rendered as a native button for keyboard and a11y correctness

ColorPicker.note: Values are stored as hex; consumers can convert to rgb/hsl/oklch as needed
Surfaces, borders and focus ring must resolve to --cascivo-* tokens

Combobox.note: Filtering can be toggled off for short lists via searchable={false}
Listbox/field styling resolves to semantic --cascivo-color-* / --cascivo-radius-* tokens

CommandMenu.note: Global Cmd/Ctrl+K binding can be disabled via hotkey={false} for custom triggering
onQueryChange + loading allow fetching items per keystroke
Palette styling resolves to semantic --cascivo-color-* / --cascivo-radius-modal tokens

Comparison.note: Horizontal or vertical depending on the content
Provide a label (or rely on the i18n default) so the slider is named

ContainedList.note: on-page sits inline; disclosed adds a header band for menus and popovers
Rows are always ul/li; do not replace with generic divs

ContextMenu.note: Accepts arbitrary ContextMenuItem children after the trigger child
Anchored at pointer coordinates via --cascivo-context-x/y custom properties set on right-click

CopyButton.note: copy/copied strings overridable via labels; default from i18n catalog
Styling resolves to semantic --cascivo-color-* tokens; copied state uses --cascivo-color-success

DataList.note: horizontal for wide panels, vertical for narrow columns; size tunes density
Always renders dl/dt/dd; do not substitute generic elements

DataTable.note: Choose client/server sort and density to fit data size and layout
All surfaces, borders, and spacing must resolve to --cascivo-* tokens

DatePicker.note: All date props are ISO YYYY-MM-DD strings
Display, weekday labels, and week start derive from the current i18n locale via Intl

DateRangePicker.note: value/defaultValue are { start: Date; end: Date } with native Date objects compared in UTC
Optional preset ranges render as quick-select buttons in a side column
Display, weekday labels, and week start derive from the locale via Intl

Dock.note: Renders <a> when href is provided, <button> otherwise — no wrapper needed
Hidden at 64rem (lg) via display:none — not configurable to preserve mobile-only intent

Drawer.note: Limited to start | end | top | bottom — drives the slide direction and animation
Any children; the consumer owns the panel contents

Dropdown.note: Any ReactElement works as the trigger; ref and aria props are merged in
Supports open + onOpenChange or fully internal state
Menu styling resolves to semantic --cascivo-color-* / --cascivo-z-dropdown tokens

Editable.note: Visual styling must resolve to the listed --cascivo-* surface/border/accent/text tokens
submitOnBlur toggles whether blurring confirms or cancels the edit

EmptyState.note: Action and icon are optional; size scales for full-page vs in-panel use
Text and background colors must resolve to --cascivo-* tokens

Fab.note: Omit for a single-action button, or provide a speed-dial of secondary actions
Anchored to bottom-end or bottom-start; honours safe-area insets

Field.note: Spacing and color must resolve to --cascivo-* semantic tokens
Any single element accepting id/aria-* props can be the child control

FileUploader.note: Status colors must resolve to --cascivo-color-accent/success/danger tokens
Overridable via label/hint props or the labels object
Configure freely; rejected files surface through onRejected

Filter.note: pill suits floating filter bars; outline suits embedded filter rows within a bordered container
single-select for mutually exclusive categories; multi for additive facets

Form.note: Use schema, validate, or both; schema runs first and validate only if the schema passes
Any control can be wired via form.field(name); children are free-form
onValid only fires when validation produces no errors; submission is guarded by the submitting signal

Header.note: Brand, links, and actions slots are optional and composable
Surface, border, and z-index must resolve to --cascivo-* tokens

HeaderPanel.note: Surface, shadow, and sizing must resolve to --cascivo-* shell tokens

Heading.note: size may override the level-derived default for visual scale
Levels must not skip — maintain a valid heading hierarchy

HoverCard.note: Surface, border, radius, shadow, and motion must resolve to the listed --cascivo-* tokens
openDelay and closeDelay are tunable per instance (defaults 300/100ms)

IconButton.note: Sizing must resolve to --cascivo-control-height-* so it stays square and aligned with other controls
Any single icon node; consumer owns the icon set

Image.note: Pick the corner radius that matches the surrounding surface
Radius and placeholder colors must resolve to --cascivo-* tokens

Indicator.note: All four corners are supported; top-end is the most common convention for notification counts

InlineLoading.note: Defaults come from the i18n catalog per status; override with label or the per-status labels map
active must show a spinner, finished a success icon, error an error icon — do not repurpose

Input.note: Surface, border, accent, destructive, radius, and focus-ring must resolve to the listed --cascivo-* tokens
sm | md | lg, defaulting to md

InputGroup.note: Addon background, border, text, and radius must resolve to the listed --cascivo-* tokens
InputGroupAddon align is inline-start (leading) or inline-end (trailing)
prefix/suffix and addon children accept arbitrary ReactNode

Item.note: Tune density and emphasis to match the surrounding list
Media, content, title, description, and actions are optional and composable

Join.note: Horizontal and vertical grouping are both supported via the orientation prop

Kbd.note: sm fits inline help; md matches body text
Surface and border must resolve to --cascivo-* tokens

Label.note: Colors and type must resolve to --cascivo-* semantic tokens

Link.note: standalone vs inline depending on whether the link sits in prose
Accent colors and focus ring must resolve to --cascivo-* tokens

List.note: disc/decimal/none chosen to match content and visual needs
Spacing and text color must resolve to --cascivo-* tokens

Menu.note: Surface, border, radius, shadow, and motion must resolve to the listed --cascivo-* tokens
MenuItem accepts arbitrary children; onSelect defines the action
MenuItem and MenuSeparator can be mixed freely under the trigger

MenuButton.note: Trigger and menu styling must resolve to the listed --cascivo-* tokens
Each item label accepts arbitrary ReactNode; onSelect defines the action
variant and size choose among the standard button looks and dimensions

Menubar.note: Menus are described by data (menus prop) so roles and keyboard wiring stay correct
Surface, borders, and focus ring must resolve to --cascivo-* tokens

Modal.note: Overlay surface, border, radius, shadow, and focus-ring must resolve to the listed --cascivo-* tokens
sm | md | lg, defaulting to md
All optional; body accepts arbitrary children

MultiSelect.note: Surface, border, accent, radius, shadow, focus-ring, and motion must resolve to the listed --cascivo-* tokens
placeholder, selected(count), search, and noResults are overridable
Caller supplies the option list and may mark individual options disabled

NativeSelect.note: Pass an options array or raw <option> children

NavigationMenu.note: content is arbitrary ReactNode; links without content render as plain anchors

Notification.note: A variant-appropriate icon is supplied by default; override with the icon prop
Any ReactNode (typically Buttons) can fill the actions slot
warning/error must use role="alert"; info/success use role="status"

NumberInput.note: Visual props must resolve to the listed --cascivo-* semantic tokens
min, max, step, precision, and formatOptions are free to suit the value domain

OtpInput.note: Slot styling must resolve to the listed --cascivo-* tokens
length and numeric/alphanumeric type are free to match the issued code format

OverflowMenu.note: Trigger and item styling must resolve to the listed --cascivo-* tokens
items, ariaLabel, and placement are free to suit the context

Pagination.note: pageSizeOptions and the size select are optional
Surfaces, borders, and accent must resolve to --cascivo-* tokens

PasswordInput.note: Field, toggle, and strength-meter styling must resolve to the listed --cascivo-* tokens
reveal, hide, and strengthLabel can be overridden via the labels prop

Popover.note: Panel styling must resolve to the listed --cascivo-* tokens
Trigger and panel content are arbitrary children supplied by the consumer

Progress.note: Choose the variant that matches the semantic meaning of the operation

ProgressBar.note: Presence of value selects the mode
Fill and status colors must resolve to --cascivo-* tokens

ProgressCircle.note: showValue pairs best with md/lg sizes
Arc and track colors must resolve to --cascivo-* tokens

ProgressIndicator.note: horizontal or vertical to fit the layout
Step and connector colors must resolve to --cascivo-* tokens

Prose.note: Accepts authored children or rendered markup
All typography and surface styling resolves to --cascivo-* tokens

PullToRefresh.note: Pull distance required to trigger is configurable (default 64px)
May return a promise; the spinner persists until it settles

QrCode.note: Raise to Q/H when the code may be printed small or partially obscured
Defaults to currentColor; keep sufficient contrast between fill and background to stay scannable

RadialProgress.note: Default is the percentage string; pass children to override with any content
Color resolves through --cascivo-color-* semantic tokens via data-variant

Radio.note: Control and label styling must resolve to the listed --cascivo-* tokens
Labels are free text and the group supports horizontal or vertical orientation

RadioCard.note: Card and indicator styling must resolve to the listed --cascivo-* tokens
title and description accept arbitrary ReactNode content

RatingGroup.note: Star styling must resolve to the listed --cascivo-* tokens
max sets the scale and labels.rating customizes the per-star announcement

RelativeTime.note: Pass Intl.RelativeTimeFormat options (e.g. numeric: "auto") to tune the wording
Disable ticking for static contexts or long-past dates

Resizable.note: Pane sizes derive from a single --cascivo-resizable-ratio custom property via flex

ScrollArea.note: vertical, horizontal, or both depending on content
Relies on native overflow scrolling — never replace with JS scrolling

Search.note: Field and control styling must resolve to the listed --cascivo-* tokens
debounceMs and the placeholder/label/clear copy are free to suit the context

SegmentedControl.note: Segment styling must resolve to the listed --cascivo-* tokens
option label and value are free, and individual options may be disabled

Select.note: Visual props must resolve to --cascivo-color-* / radius / focus-ring tokens
Free, supplied by the consumer via the options array

Separator.note: Mark decorative when the break carries no meaning beyond visuals

Sheet.note: Limited to start | end | top | bottom — drives the slide direction and animation
Any children; consumer owns the panel contents

ShellHeader.note: Brand, nav, actions, and end are composable and optional
Surfaces, sizing, and accent must resolve to --cascivo-* shell tokens

SideNav.note: Rail behavior is configurable for density needs
Sizing, surfaces, and motion must resolve to --cascivo-* tokens

Skeleton.note: Shape, width, height, and line count match the pending content
Background and radius must resolve to --cascivo-* tokens

SkipNav.note: targetId/id may be customized as long as they match
SkipNavLink must be the first focusable element to function

Slider.note: Track and thumb colors must resolve to --cascivo-color-* / radius / focus-ring tokens

Spinner.note: sm/md/lg to fit inline vs standalone use

Stack.note: The pixel offset is fully configurable; set to 0 for a pure overlap with no shift

Stat.note: Optional — include only when change is meaningful

Status.note: Enable pulse only for actively-changing states

Steps.note: Each step can override derived pending/active/complete state via step.state
Horizontal for top progress bars, vertical for sidebar wizards

StructuredList.note: Toggle selectable based on whether the list is interactive or purely presentational
Static uses table semantics; selectable uses radiogroup — do not mix

Swap.note: on/off slots accept any ReactNode — icons, text, images
rotate (default) or flip — choose based on the visual metaphor of the icons

SwipeItem.note: Any number of leading and/or trailing actions; each may be destructive
Leading reveals on the start edge, trailing on the end edge (physical-axis drag)

Switcher.note: Accent and surface colors must resolve to --cascivo-* tokens

Tabs.note: Use value or defaultValue depending on control needs
Accent, borders, and focus ring must resolve to --cascivo-* tokens

Tag.note: onDismiss is optional; variant matches semantic meaning
Variant colors must resolve to --cascivo-color-*-subtle tokens

TagsInput.note: Free text, optionally constrained by the validate predicate and max count
Enter and comma commit a tag; Backspace on empty removes the last — fixed interaction contract

Text.note: Choose element and treatment to fit context
Font, leading, and color must resolve to --cascivo-* tokens

Textarea.note: Border/focus/error colors must resolve to --cascivo-color-* / focus-ring tokens
Consumer chooses initial rows and whether the field can resize

Tile.note: asChild renders onto a custom element via Slot

TimePicker.note: Value is a 24-hour HH:mm string driven by the native time input

Timeline.note: vertical for feeds, horizontal for compact progress strips
Use a single current item; status drives marker colour via data-status

Toast.note: Limited to default | success | warning | destructive — drives color and live-region urgency

Toc.note: Control the highlight externally, or omit it for built-in scroll-spy
Colors, focus ring, and touch target must resolve to --cascivo-* tokens

Toggle.note: Track and thumb colors must resolve to --cascivo-color-* / radius / focus-ring tokens
Optional label describing the setting being toggled

ToggleGroup.note: Item height must resolve to --cascivo-control-height-* to align with other controls
Items may use a text label, an icon, or both; consumer owns the icon set

Toggletip.note: Trigger and bubble styling must resolve to the listed --cascivo-* tokens
trigger and children accept arbitrary ReactNode supplied by the consumer
Use uncontrolled (defaultOpen) or controlled (open + onOpenChange) as needed

Tooltip.note: Limited to top | right | bottom | left, positioned via CSS anchor
Consumer can tune the show delay (default 200ms)

TreeView.note: single vs multi is the consumer’s choice based on the interaction
Arrow/Home/End/typeahead behavior follows the APG tree pattern and must not be re-mapped
Per-level indent is driven by --cascivo-tree-indent and may be overridden

User.note: Any ReactNode — email, role, or a status line
Name and description colors must resolve to --cascivo-* tokens

VisuallyHidden.note: Any text/content meant for assistive tech
Must keep content in the a11y tree — never display:none
